title: dbg124 site menu user identity and theme
description:
PipeSync desktop and mobile now show your display name, role badge, and theme picker inside the top-right site menu instead of separate header strips. Mojibake in role subtitles (garbled middle-dot separators) is fixed with clean role labels.

Mobile header layout is tightened: sync status and refresh sit next to the menu; the old full-width user bar is removed.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Move user badge and theme selector into PipeSync site menu (desktop and mobile).
Fix session role label encoding (Customer, Admin, Employee, etc.) without corrupted separators.
Keep site menu open while changing theme; focus handling for theme select.
Cache bust dbg124 on PipeSync, mobile HTML, CSS, and addon manifest.
